text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Done is better than perfect.
author: Sheryl Sandberg

text: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
author: Chinese Proverb

text: Creativity is intelligence having fun.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Almost everything will work again if you unplug it for a few minutes, including you.
author: Anne Lamott

text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
author: Confucius

text: Focus on being productive instead of busy.
author: Tim Ferriss

text: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
author: Albert Einstein

text: The chief enemy of creativity is good sense.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: The present moment is filled with joy and happiness. If you are attentive, you will see it.
author: Thich Nhat Hanh

text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
author: Winston Churchill

text: Amateurs sit and wait for inspiration, the rest of us just get up and go to work.
author: Stephen King

text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
author: Socrates

text: Every child is an artist. The problem is how to remain an artist once we grow up.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: Feelings come and go like clouds in a windy sky. Conscious breathing is my anchor.
author: Thich Nhat Hanh

text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

text: Until we can manage time, we can manage nothing else.
author: Peter Drucker

text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
author: Aristotle

text: Imagination is the beginning of creation.
author: George Bernard Shaw

text: Be where you are, not where you think you should be.
author: Unknown

text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
author: Walt Disney

text: Turn your wounds into wisdom.
author: Oprah Winfrey

text: You can't use up creativity. The more you use, the more you have.
author: Maya Angelou

text: Wherever you are, be there totally.
author: Eckhart Tolle

text: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
author: Zig Ziglar

text: If you spend too much time thinking about a thing, you'll never get it done.
author: Bruce Lee

text: The unexamined life is not worth living.
author: Socrates

text: Art is not what you see, but what you make others see.
author: Edgar Degas

text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
author: Buddha

text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
author: Sam Levenson

text: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
author: Leonardo da Vinci

text: We do not see things as they are, we see them as we are.
author: Anaïs Nin

text: The desire to create is one of the deepest yearnings of the human soul.
author: Dieter F. Uchtdorf

text: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
author: Buddha

text: Everything you've ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
author: George Addair

text: It's not that I'm so smart, it's just that I stay with problems longer.
author: Albert Einstein

text: The only thing I know is that I know nothing.
author: Socrates

text: To be creative means to be in love with life.
author: Osho

text: Do every act of your life as though it were the very last act of your life.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: Your limitation—it's only your imagination.
author: Unknown

text: Either you run the day or the day runs you.
author: Jim Rohn

text: He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

text: Creativity takes courage.
author: Henri Matisse

text: The greatest weapon against stress is our ability to choose one thought over another.
author: William James

text: It always seems impossible until it's done.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: The key is not to prioritize what's on your schedule, but to schedule your priorities.
author: Stephen Covey

text: You cannot find peace by avoiding life.
author: Virginia Woolf

text: Learn the rules like a pro, so you can break them like an artist.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: In today's rush, we all think too much, seek too much, want too much, and forget about the joy of just being.
author: Eckhart Tolle

text: I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
author: Thomas Edison

text: Efficiency is doing things right; effectiveness is doing the right things.
author: Peter Drucker

text: The mind that opens to a new idea never returns to its original size.
author: Albert Einstein

text: The world always seems brighter when you've just made something that wasn't there before.
author: Neil Gaiman

text: Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
author: Lao Tzu

text: Hardships often prepare ordinary people for an extraordinary destiny.
author: C.S. Lewis

text: Action is the foundational key to all success.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: A life spent making mistakes is not only more honorable, but more useful than a life spent doing nothing.
author: George Bernard Shaw

text: Creativity is contagious, pass it on.
author: Albert Einstein

text: When you realize nothing is lacking, the whole world belongs to you.
author: Lao Tzu

text: Don't be pushed around by the fears in your mind. Be led by the dreams in your heart.
author: Roy T. Bennett

text: Time is what we want most, but what we use worst.
author: William Penn

text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
author: Lao Tzu

text: Have no fear of perfection — you'll never reach it.
author: Salvador Dalí

text: Be happy in the moment, that's enough. Each moment is all we need, not more.
author: Mother Teresa

text: Whether you think you can or you think you can't, you're right.
author: Henry Ford

text: Plans are nothing; planning is everything.
author: Dwight D. Eisenhower

text: What we think, we become.
author: Buddha

text: The true sign of intelligence is not knowledge but imagination.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Breathe. Let go. And remind yourself that this very moment is the only one you know you have for sure.
author: Oprah Winfrey

text: The harder you work for something, the greater you'll feel when you achieve it.
author: Unknown

text: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
author: Arthur Ashe

text: In three words I can sum up everything I've learned about life: it goes on.
author: Robert Frost

text: Creativity is allowing yourself to make mistakes. Art is knowing which ones to keep.
author: Scott Adams

text: The quieter you become, the more you are able to hear.
author: Rumi

text: If you want to achieve greatness stop asking for permission.
author: Unknown

text: A year from now you may wish you had started today.
author: Karen Lamb

text: Life can only be understood backwards; but it must be lived forwards.
author: Søren Kierkegaard

text: Every artist was first an amateur.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

text: Smile, breathe, and go slowly.
author: Thich Nhat Hanh

text: Go the extra mile. It's never crowded there.
author: Dr. Wayne D. Dyer

text: Do the hard jobs first. The easy jobs will take care of themselves.
author: Dale Carnegie

text: Not all those who wander are lost.
author: J.R.R. Tolkien

text: Curiosity about life in all of its aspects, I think, is still the secret of great creative people.
author: Leo Burnett

text: With the new day comes new strength and new thoughts.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

text: Dream big and dare to fail.
author: Norman Vaughan

text: You don't need more time, you need fewer distractions.
author: Unknown

text: Happiness is not something ready made. It comes from your own actions.
author: Dalai Lama

text: The creative adult is the child who survived.
author: Ursula K. Le Guin

text: Life is available only in the present moment.
author: Thich Nhat Hanh

text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

text: Nothing is less productive than to make more efficient what should not be done at all.
author: Peter Drucker

text: An unexamined life is not worth living.
author: Socrates

text: Imagination is more important than knowledge.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Within you, there is a stillness and a sanctuary to which you can retreat at any time.
author: Hermann Hesse

text: Small daily improvements over time lead to stunning results.
author: Robin Sharma

text: Productivity is never an accident. It is always the result of a commitment to excellence.
author: Paul J. Meyer

text: The only real failure is the failure to try.
author: Unknown

text: To live a creative life, we must lose our fear of being wrong.
author: Joseph Chilton Pearce

text: The best way to capture moments is to pay attention. This is how we cultivate mindfulness.
author: Jon Kabat-Zinn
